creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Felder from comment #0)

Hi, Mark!

I appreciate you effort, but there are so many things wrong with this port that I don't know where to start. I've listed some of them in the comment on the Phabricator, but that's only tip of the iceberg.

Please, get some patience and wait until I'll commit the finished port.

Feel free to use your own overlay port for yourself meanwhile.
